title: torreyochloa pauciflora var. holmii
intro: Torreyochloa pauciflora var. holmii is an aquatic grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the Holm's spike-rush or spike rush. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Torreyochloa pauciflora var. holmii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusing the leaves and stems in water to create a decoction or tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
